scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'if [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ] || [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.vercel-build: cd artifacts/api-server && npm run build && cd ../.. && node vercel-setup.mjs
